2604.20191.title: From Scene to Object: Text-Guided Dual-Gaze Prediction
2604.20191.paper_summary: Interpretable driver attention prediction is crucial for human-like autonomous driving. However, existing datasets provide only scene-level global gaze rather than fine-grained object-level annotations, inherently failing to support text-grounded cognitive modeling. Consequently, while Vision-Language Models (VLMs) hold great potential for semantic reasoning, this critical data limitations leads to severe text-vision decoupling and visual-bias hallucinations. To break this bottleneck and achieve precise object-level attention prediction, this paper proposes a novel dual-branch gaze prediction framework, establishing a complete paradigm from data construction to model architecture. First, we construct G-W3DA, a object-level driver attention dataset. By integrating a multimodal large language model with the Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM3), we decouple macroscopic heatmaps into object-level masks under rigorous cross-validation, fundamentally eliminating annotation hallucinations. Building upon this high-quality data foundation, we propose the DualGaze-VLM architecture. This architecture extracts the hidden states of semantic queries and dynamically modulates visual features via a Condition-Aware SE-Gate, achieving intent-driven precise spatial anchoring. Extensive experiments on the W3DA benchmark demonstrate that DualGaze-VLM consistently surpasses existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) models in spatial alignment metrics, notably achieving up to a 17.8% improvement in Similarity (SIM) under safety-critical scenarios. Furthermore, a visual Turing test reveals that the attention heatmaps generated by DualGaze-VLM are perceived as authentic by 88.22% of human evaluators, proving its capability to generate rational cognitive priors.
2604.20191.paper_summary_zh: 可解釋的駕駛者注意力預測對於類人自主駕駛至關重要。<lb/>然而，現有數據集僅提供場景級的全球凝視，而非細粒度的物體級標註，這本質上無法支持基於文本的認知建模。<lb/>因此，儘管視覺-語言模型（VLMs）在語義推理方面具有巨大潛力，但這一關鍵數據限制導致了嚴重的文本-視覺脫節和視覺偏見幻覺。<lb/>為了打破這一瓶頸並實現精確的物體級注意力預測，本文提出了一種新穎的雙分支凝視預測框架，建立了一個從數據構建到模型架構的完整範式。<lb/>首先，我們構建了 G-W3DA，一個物體級駕駛者注意力數據集。<lb/>通過將多模態大型語言模型與 Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM3) 整合，我們在嚴格的交叉驗證下將宏觀熱圖解耦為物體級掩碼，從根本上消除了標註幻覺。<lb/>在這一高質量數據基礎上，我們提出了 DualGaze-VLM 架構。<lb/>該架構提取語義查詢的隱藏狀態，並通過條件感知 SE-Gate 動態調節視覺特徵，實現意圖驅動的精確空間錨定。<lb/>在 W3DA 基準上的廣泛實驗表明，DualGaze-VLM 在空間對齊指標上始終超越現有的最先進（SOTA）模型，特別是在安全關鍵場景下實現了高達 17.8% 的相似度（SIM）改善。<lb/>此外，視覺圖靈測試顯示，88.22% 的人類評估者認為 DualGaze-VLM 生成的注意力熱圖是真實的，證明了其生成合理認知先驗的能力。
2604.20191.author: Zehong Ke et.al.
2604.20191.authors: Zehong Ke, Yanbo Jiang, Jinhao Li, Zhiyuan Liu, Yiqian Tu, Qingwen Meng, Heye Huang, Jianqiang Wang
